headline: American Tower Leans On CoreSite 100Gbps Push For AI Growth
summary: CoreSite, a data center business of American Tower (NYSE:AMT), has introduced 100Gbps connectivity across its nationwide Open Cloud Exchange platform. This upgrade is designed to support AI, machine learning, and other high-performance workloads that require very high bandwidth. American Tower has raised its full year outlook as it seeks to benefit from rising demand for digital infrastructure tied to cloud and AI use cases. For investors watching NYSE:AMT, the CoreSite data center segment...
